description: Agent has zero input/output example blocks; zero examples makes dispatch behavior opaque without reading the full body.
suggested_fix: Add at least two examples in frontmatter or body showing natural-language input and the resulting slash-command dispatch.

description: Agent frontmatter declares tools but omits the model field; defaults silently to whatever Claude version is current at runtime.
suggested_fix: Add 'model: claude-sonnet-4-6' (or appropriate tier) to the frontmatter.

description: Bash is declared in allowed-tools but no Bash command appears in the skill body; explicit Bash usage lives in instalar-fin-mcp, not here.
suggested_fix: Remove Bash from allowed-tools in onboarding/SKILL.md unless a specific Bash call is added to the body.

description: 'alguns reais' (rendimento-residual tolerance) is imprecise; the %-based alternative clause partially mitigates but the phrase alone is not actionable.
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete default such as 'R$5 ou 0,5% do saldo, o que for menor' and remove the word 'alguns'.

description: 'se a confiança no parse for baixa' lacks a numeric or categorical threshold; an agent cannot reliably decide when to abort without a defined cutoff.
suggested_fix: Define a specific criterion such as 'fewer than 50% of lines successfully parsed' or a named confidence level.

description: 'tipicamente até 3 meses antes' when searching for an estorno's original transaction — 'tipicamente' is not a hard bound and cannot be enforced consistently.
suggested_fix: Remove 'tipicamente' and state 'within 3 months before the refund date' as a hard search window.

description: 'caso raro' used to describe when a saque should be treated as an expense rather than a transfer — no decision criteria given, leaving the classification to model judgement.
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit criteria, e.g. 'only if the person explicitly states it is a fee (taxa de saque), not a cash withdrawal'.

description: 'algo crítico' in Modo B validation step is undefined — no list of what fields are critical vs optional.
suggested_fix: Enumerate the critical fields explicitly: 'cartao sem vencimento' and 'conta sem tipo' are critical; 'categoria sem subcategorias' is not.

description: 'muito próximas' for grouping establishment name variants has no edit-distance threshold or normalization algorithm specified.
suggested_fix: Define a normalization step (lowercase + strip special chars + strip trailing digits) and a string-similarity threshold, e.g. Levenshtein distance <= 2.

description: npx -y fin-app-mcp has no version pin; any new npm release including a compromised one is silently adopted on next Claude restart.
suggested_fix: Pin to the current stable release: replace 'fin-app-mcp' with 'fin-app-mcp@X.Y.Z' (run 'npm view fin-app-mcp version' to get it).

description: MCP server contacts external API at https://fin-app-wine.vercel.app on every invocation; documents a live external dependency whose availability and trustworthiness is outside the plugin's control.
suggested_fix: Document the dependency in README and consider adding a health-check fallback message in the agent when the API is unreachable.

description: npx -y auto-downloads and executes the npm package without user confirmation at each invocation; standard pattern for MCP servers but elevates supply-chain risk slightly.
suggested_fix: Pair with version pinning (SEC-unpinned-semver fix) to bound the risk; no additional change needed once version is pinned.
